recommendations.title: And Their Children After Them
recommendations.overview: In eastern France, two teenage cousins have the summer of their lives when they paddle a purloined canoe to the far shore of a lake.

recommendations.title: Killing Cabos
recommendations.overview: Two young men get involved with some criminals while trying to free the tycoon they kidnapped.

recommendations.title: On Deadly Ground
recommendations.overview: Forrest Taft is an environmental agent who works for the Aegis Oil Company in Alaska. Aegis Oil's corrupt CEO is the kind of person who doesn't care whether or not oil spills into the ocean or onto the land—just as long as it's making money for him.

recommendations.title: The Anomaly
recommendations.overview: A former soldier is taken captive and awakens in the back of a van where he learns that he only has less than 10 minutes to figure out how he got there.

recommendations.title: Spree
recommendations.overview: Desperate for an online following, a rideshare driver has figured out a deadly plan to go viral and he will stop at nothing to get his five minutes of fame.

recommendations.title: How to Blow Up a Pipeline
recommendations.overview: A crew of young environmental activists execute a daring mission to sabotage an oil pipeline.

recommendations.title: United 93
recommendations.overview: A real-time account of the events on United Flight 93, one of the planes hijacked on 9/11 that crashed near Shanksville, Pennsylvania when passengers foiled the terrorist plot.

recommendations.title: Captain Phillips
recommendations.overview: The true story of Captain Richard Phillips and the 2009 hijacking by Somali pirates of the US-flagged MV Maersk Alabama, the first American cargo ship to be hijacked in two hundred years.

recommendations.title: The Marine 3: Homefront
recommendations.overview: A Marine must do whatever it takes to save his kidnapped sister and stop a terrorist attack masterminded by a radical militia group.

recommendations.title: Chor Nikal Ke Bhaga
recommendations.overview: A flight attendant and her boyfriend must steal a cache of diamonds to clear an old debt — but the plan spins into a mayhem when the plane gets hijacked.
